disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two episodes of near-fainting (presyncope) today, brought on by mild exertion and standing
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the dizzy spells?
Did you feel like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Twice today I felt like I was going to go down — really light-headed and unsteady — just from walking to the kitchen. I had to sit before I dropped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Central chest heaviness on exertion, dull, non-radiating, no spread to arm or jaw
trigger_question_examples: Tell me more about the heavy feeling in your chest.
Does the chest feeling spread anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a dull heaviness right in the middle of my chest. It doesn't go into my arm or jaw, but it's there when I move about.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Shortness of breath on mild exertion
trigger_question_examples: Are you getting short of breath?
Does moving around leave you breathless?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do get a bit puffed when I move around, more than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive generalised fatigue over the past month
trigger_question_examples: How long have you been feeling washed out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been drained and washed out for about a month now, it's been building up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms are positional and exertional — worsen on standing and walking, improve with rest
trigger_question_examples: What brings the dizziness on, and what settles it?
Is it worse standing up or sitting down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It comes on when I stand and walk, and it eases off when I sit and rest — then it comes back when I get up again.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies frank syncope, palpitations, and orthopnoea
trigger_question_examples: Have you actually blacked out or felt your heart racing?
Do you get breathless lying flat at night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't actually fainted or blacked out, my heart doesn't feel like it's racing, and I sleep flat fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known hypertension, taking perindopril and compliant
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got high blood pressure and I take my perindopril every day without missing it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fall risk during presyncopal episodes; spouse present and assisting
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unsteady on your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My wife's here with me. When the dizziness hits I'm really unsteady and she's worried I'll fall.
